channel.title: Software Engineering on Tyma
channel.description: Recent content in Software Engineering on Tyma

item.title: A Google Interviewing Story
item.description: A few years ago I was entering the Silicon Valley job market and at that time looking for senior engineering positions. A good rule of thumb about interviewing if you haven’t done it in awhile is to at least somewhat accept that you’ll probably make a few mistakes on your first few tries. Simply, don’t go for your dream job first. There are a million nuances to interviewing that you’ve forgotten, and a few up-front, not-so-important interviews first will educate (or re-educate) about them.
